  • Uses of Simulation in dom.institution.lab.cns.engine

    Methods in dom.institution.lab.cns.engine that return Simulation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Simulation
    SimulatorFactory.createSimulation(int simID)
    Creates and fully configures a new Simulation instance.
    Methods in dom.institution.lab.cns.engine with parameters of type Simulation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SimulatorFactory.addNetwork(Simulation s, NodeSet ns)
    Creates and attaches the network component to the given simulation.
    void
    SimulatorFactory.addNetworkSampler(Simulation s)
    Adds and configures the network sampler for the given simulation.
    void
    SimulatorFactory.addNodeSampler(Simulation s)
    Adds and configures the node sampler for the given simulation.
    void
    SimulatorFactory.addTransactionSampler(Simulation s)
    Adds and configures the transaction sampler for the given simulation.
    abstract NodeSet
    SimulatorFactory.createNodeSet(Simulation s)
    Creates the NodeSet for the given simulation.
    void
    SimulatorFactory.scheduleBeliefReports(Simulation s)
    Schedules periodic belief report events within the simulation.
    void
    SimulatorFactory.setHardTerminationTime(Simulation s)
    Sets a hard termination time for the simulation based on the sim.terminate.atTime property in Config.

  • Uses of Simulation in dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.event

    Methods in dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.event with parameters of type Simulation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Event_ContainerArrival.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the event’s behavior within the given simulation context.
    void
    Event_ContainerValidation.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the event within the given simulation context.
    void
    Event_HashPowerChange.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the event logic for changing a node's hashpower.
    void
    Event_NewTransactionArrival.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the event logic for a new transaction arrival.
    void
    Event_Report_BeliefReport.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the belief report event.
    void
    Event_Report_NodeStatusReport.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the node status report event.
    void
    Event_Report_StructureReport.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the structure report event.
    void
    Event_SeedUpdate.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the seed update event in the simulation.
    void
    Event_TransactionPropagation.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the transaction propagation event in the simulation.
    void
    Event.happen(Simulation sim)
    Executes the event in the context of a simulation.

  • Uses of Simulation in dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.reporter

    Methods in dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.reporter with parameters of type Simulation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ReportEventFactory.scheduleBeliefReports_Count(long count, Simulation sim, long offset)
    Schedules a specified number of Event_Report_BeliefReport events evenly distributed over the simulation duration, adjusted by an offset.
    void
    ReportEventFactory.scheduleBeliefReports_Interval(long interval, Simulation sim, long offset)
    Schedules Event_Report_BeliefReport events at fixed intervals throughout the simulation duration, adjusted by an offset.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractNetworkSampler
    NetworkSamplerFactory.getNetworkSampler(Long seed, boolean seedFlag, Sampler outerSampler, Simulation sim)
    Creates an AbstractNetworkSampler instance.
    AbstractNodeSampler
    NodeSamplerFactory.getSampler(String path, String seedChain, String changeTimes, String updateFlags, Sampler sampler, Simulation sim)
    Creates and configures an AbstractNodeSampler instance based on the given parameters.
    AbstractTransactionSampler
    TransactionSamplerFactory.getSampler(String path, Sampler outerSampler, Simulation sim)
    Creates an AbstractTransactionSampler instance according to the provided parameters.
